title: Malaysian-Style Lentil Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and nutritious lentil stir fry inspired by Malaysian cuisine. This dish is quick to make and packed with protein and fiber.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it starts to brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the Malaysian chili paste and cook for another minute, stirring constantly.
Add the red lentils and stir to combine with the onion and chili paste mixture.
Cook for about 5 minutes, or until the lentils start to soften.
Add the crispy tofu and stir to combine with the lentil mixture.
Cook for another 2-3 minutes, or until the tofu is heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
Serve with fry sauce on the side, if desired.
